questions.question: Explain the concept of a string in the context of the Theory of Computation. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the properties of a string relevant to the Theory of Computation.

questions.question: Define the null string and explain its significance in the Theory of Computation. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the role of the null string in algorithms and computability.

questions.question: State the difference between a finite string and an infinite string in the context of the Theory of Computation. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare the properties of finite and infinite strings relevant to the Theory of Computation.
